github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Always generate commit messages using this format: type(scope): message
The type must describe the kind of change, for example: feat, fix, refactor, chore, docs, style, test, perf.
The scope must describe the changed area of the codebase, for example: auth, cart, products, checkout, api, ui.
The message must be short, clear, and written in English.
Use lowercase for type and scope.
Do not end the message with a period.
